name: Lime
description: A limey product kit — warm cream + near-black ink + a vivid acid-lime accent. Heavy Hanken Grotesk display, monospace micro-labels, highlight-marker headings, a marquee and dark bento sections. Light + dark, EN/AR + RTL. Runnable React app.
prompt: A limey digital-business-card kit — warm cream + near-black ink + a vivid acid-lime accent, heavy Hanken Grotesk display, monospace micro-labels, highlight-marker headings, a marquee and dark bento sections. React-first. Full dark mode and EN/AR + RTL. Ship landing, pricing, dashboard, and a components showcase.
buildSteps: Forked an existing kit with `uikit-studio new`, then reskinned its identity.
Tokens (tokens.json) → theme.css: lime brand scale, cream/ink, dark block, [dir=rtl] Arabic font swap, Hanken Grotesk display.
i18n (en + ar): a digital-card narrative — taps, designs, NFC/QR, lead capture.
Reused the design system: cn, Button, Card, Input, Badge, Pill, Mark, Marquee, Container; Navbar/Footer/StatCards blocks.
Four pages: Landing (hero · marquee · designs grid · dark bento · CTA), Pricing, Dashboard, Components showcase. Validated with `uikit-studio validate`.
consumeSteps: cd my-app/react && pnpm install && pnpm dev
Open in Claude Code and ask: 'build a digital business card page using this kit'
